title: accessing 2D array defined through generate command

features.name: 2D array assignment via generate loop with hierarchical references
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array assigned through a generate loop where array elements are sourced from hierarchical module references

features.name: generate loop index zero incorrect concatenation
features.description: Code should include a generate loop assigning array elements from concatenation of hierarchical references where the generated index zero causes incorrect bit connections in the concatenated result
